Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(core/application): complete ruleset rewrite, missing chess rules, and promotion picker redesign

  Implements all missing standard chess rules, game-end detection, and a
  visual redesign of the pawn promotion picker. 271 tests pass (179 core,
  42 application, 50 server), 0 failures. 57 files changed.

  Chess rules (core):
  - En passant: generation in PossibleStandardPawnMoves + execution-time
    detection in Board.executeMove (diagonal pawn to empty square)
  - Castling fix: canCastleToward() scanner replaces broken De Morgan logic;
    rook hasMoved flag now set correctly after castling
  - Check-legality filter: getLegalSquares() deep-copy-simulates every
    candidate and discards moves leaving the king in check
  - Castling-through-check and castling-while-in-check excluded in filter
  - King adjacency: canBeCaptured() now scans for opposing king (8 dirs)
  - castlingChar() now guards against enemy rooks at castling corners

  Game-end detection (core):
  - Checkmate, stalemate, 50-move rule, threefold repetition, insufficient
    material (K vs K, K+B, K+N) all detected in evaluateGameEnd()
  - Position key encoding: colour + piece placement + castling rights + ep file
  - OnlineGame backup/restore covers halfMoveClock and positionHistory

  Infrastructure (core):
  - Piece.copy() on all 6 subclasses (King/Rook preserve hasMoved)
  - Board.getCopy() is a true deep copy; CastleMove created correctly in
    Game.movePiece() so Board.executeMove triggers rook relocation
  - All German strings in GameState and Game replaced with English
  - Magic constants replaced with board dimension accessors

  Promotion picker redesign (application):
  - Dedicated .promotion-piece-btn CSS class in base.css and all 4 themes;
    buttons size responsively via squareSize.multiply(0.9) binding
  - Title label removed; FXML layout tightened
  - 140ms fade+scale entry animation

  Known deferred debt (ADR 0006):
  - hasAnyLegalMove is O(pieces × moves) per turn; incremental attack maps
    are the documented next step

  Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix flaky CI teardown by closing connector before session

Use force_close=True on TCPConnector and close it before the session
to prevent the _run_safe_shutdown_loop thread from spawning, replacing
the fragile 250ms sleep that was unreliable on CI runners.

chore: add semantic-release for automatic versioning

- feat: → minor bump (0.2.x → 0.3.0)
- fix:/perf:/refactor: → patch bump (0.2.1 → 0.2.2)
- BREAKING CHANGE → major bump (0.x → 1.0.0)
- docs/chore/test/style: → no release
Releases trigger on merge to main only.

repository.name: claude-projects
repository.description: Web projects built with Claude Code

commit.message:
Release/v0.2.0 ready (#3)

* fix: resolve eslint require() errors and format code

* 0.2.1

* Rewrote the Proxy/MCP runner to intercept the Agent's  (requests) rather than just monitoring the Server's  (responses). Dangerous actions are now caught _before_ they reach the target server.

* fix: resolve browser approval race, undo engine correctness, and UI init crash

- Race condition: autoStartDaemonAndWait now verifies HTTP readiness via
  GET /settings before returning true, preventing stale-PID false positives
- Race condition: openBrowserLocal() called immediately after daemon is
  HTTP-ready so browser starts loading before POST /check fires, ensuring
  the SSE 'add' event is delivered to an already-connected client
- Race condition: daemon skips openBrowser() when autoStarted=true to
  avoid duplicate tabs (CLI already opened the browser)
- Race condition: 'Abandoned' browser racer result now resolves the race
  as denied instead of being silently swallowed (caused CLI to hang)
- Race condition: SSE reconnect abandon timer raised 2s→10s so a page
  reload doesn't abandon pending requests before the browser reconnects
- Bug fix: cloudBadge null check in SSE 'init' handler — missing DOM
  element crashed the handler before addCard() ran, causing approval
  requests to never appear when browser was cold-started
- Undo engine: moved snapshot trigger from PostToolUse (log) to
  PreToolUse (check) so snapshot captures state before AI change, not
  after (previous timing made undo a no-op)
- Undo engine: applyUndo now deletes files created after the snapshot
  that git restore alone does not remove
- Undo engine: expanded STATE_CHANGING_TOOLS list to include
  str_replace_based_edit_tool and create_file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix prettier formatting in undo.ts

* fix: applyUndo now deletes untracked files absent from snapshot

Previously only tracked files (git ls-files) were checked for deletion,
so files created after the snapshot but never committed (e.g. test.txt)
survived the undo. Now also queries git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
to catch untracked non-ignored files — the same set git add -A captures
when building the snapshot tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: report local approval/deny back to SaaS to clear PENDING status

When a local channel (native popup, browser dashboard, terminal) wins
the approval race while cloud is also enforced, the pending SaaS request
was never resolved — leaving Mission Control stuck on PENDING forever.

Now finish() calls resolveNode9SaaS() (PATCH /intercept/requests/:id)
whenever checkedBy !== 'cloud' and a cloudRequestId exists, closing the
request immediately with the correct APPROVED/DENIED status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: cloud audit, config merge fixes, and agentVersion client tracking

core.ts:
- Fire-and-forget POST /intercept/audit for all local fast-path allows
  (ignoredTools, sandboxPaths, local-policy, trust) — gives org admins
  full visibility of calls that never reached the cloud
- Fixed config merge: sandboxPaths and ignoredTools now concatenate across
  layers (global → project → local); dangerousWords replaces (higher wins)
- agentVersion context now sent as context.agent so backend can store AI
  client type (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Terminal) separately from machine identity

cli.ts:
- Updated context payload to include agent type metadata for accurate
  per-client breakdown in Mission Control Agents tab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: nadav <isr.nadav@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix napari vispy KeyError: re-register layers with missing visuals

Root cause: layers added during deferred viewer setup weren't always
registered in napari's vispy canvas layer_to_visual mapping. Setting
layer.visible then caused KeyError in _reorder_layers_in_the_same_view.

Fix:
- Added ensure_layers_registered() to ChamberVisualizationManager that
  detects layers missing from vispy canvas and re-adds them
- Called before _update_visualization and _update_channel_availability
- Wrapped all layer.visible assignments in try/except to prevent cascade
  failures (one broken layer shouldn't block others)
- Per-channel try/except in _update_visualization so one channel error
  doesn't prevent other channels from displaying

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial blog with 5 ML model posts

- Billing: ML + Causal Inference (DML) + Operations Research
- Contact: Two-Stage Residual Learning (LR + GBT)
- Reinstatement: Cost-sensitive ensemble on imbalanced data
- Sales (active customers): Persona-based product recommendation
- Sales (lapsed customers): Adapted recommendation for reactivation

All posts confidentiality-audited: no proprietary names, tables, or exact figures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cloud audit, config merge fixes, and agentVersion client tracking

core.ts:
- Fire-and-forget POST /intercept/audit for all local fast-path allows
  (ignoredTools, sandboxPaths, local-policy, trust) — gives org admins
  full visibility of calls that never reached the cloud
- Fixed config merge: sandboxPaths and ignoredTools now concatenate across
  layers (global → project → local); dangerousWords replaces (higher wins)
- agentVersion context now sent as context.agent so backend can store AI
  client type (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Terminal) separately from machine identity

cli.ts:
- Updated context payload to include agent type metadata for accurate
  per-client breakdown in Mission Control Agents tab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Relationship Raid Boss, CV Skill Tree, Dobbie NPC System

- Relationship Raid Boss (Co-op Quests):
  QuestCard now shows a pink 💞 Raid HP bar for relationship-coop quests,
  depleting as partners complete their part (mirrors boss HP bar pattern).
  Partners shown as ○ unclaimed / ⚔ claimed / ✓ done with live counter.

- CV Builder — Skill Tree Progress:
  Skills now display as leveled cards (🌱 Novice → 📗 Apprentice → ⚔ Skilled → 👑 Expert)
  based on completion count (1 / 3 / 6 / 10+), with a progress bar to next tier
  and "N more to [tier]" hint. Replaces flat chip list.

- NPC System — Dobbie als Quest Giver:
  Dobbie panel now shows a rotating mood (😸 Content / 😾 Demanding / 😤 Annoyed /
  😻 Affectionate / 🙄 Unimpressed) cycling every 4 hours with a flavor quote.
  Added "npc-dobbie" as alias in NPC_CONFIG (page.tsx) and NPC_META (server.js)
  so quests with createdBy:"npc-dobbie" also render the 🐱 pink badge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Update CALCULATOR_URLS to use /calculators (single page app)

- Skip auth-required tests gracefully with clear annotation
- Fix button selectors to use correct title attributes

Push live search status directly from run_recheck.py main loop

Added explicit _push_search_status call every 15 companies in the recheck
loop, bypassing write_status chain which was silently failing to update
the Supabase SearchStatus table. Pushes company count, check type, and
last 60 log lines so the public site panel shows real-time progress.

commit.message:
Add live search status to public site via Supabase SearchStatus table

- _push_search_status() in searcher.py: throttled UPSERT to SearchStatus
  (once per 15s during active search, always on start/stop)
- Wired into write_status(), record_search_start(), clear_status()
- Public site polls SearchStatus every 10s using anon key
- Panel auto-shows when search is running with type, progress, log lines
- Panel hides when no search is active

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style: Redesign tab bar from navy pills to underline style (#99)

* style: Redesign tab bar from navy pills to underline style

Adopt Shadcn v4's official variant="line" pattern for TabsList.
Replace heavy bg-primary (#213350) navy container with clean
underline-style tabs matching Linear, Notion, and GitHub Primer.

tabs.tsx changes:
- Add cva with default (pill on bg-muted) and line (underline) variants
- TabsList accepts variant prop, exposes via data-variant attribute
- TabsTrigger uses group-data-[variant=...] for variant-aware styling
- Line variant uses after: pseudo-element for active underline indicator
- Default variant updated from navy bg-primary to subtle bg-muted
- Export tabsListVariants for external use

Consumer migrations (9 files, all to variant="line"):
- employee-detail-content (9 tabs with status dots)
- profile-page-content (4 tabs)
- leave-dashboard-content (4 tabs with count badge)
- absence-dashboard-content (2 tabs)
- flexible-working-dashboard (3 tabs with Badge counts)
- leaving-dashboard-content (3 tabs)
- working-location-content (outer tabs only — inner Month/Week
  stays default variant for visual hierarchy)
- learning/courses/page (4 tabs)
- learning/my-courses/page (3 tabs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Update plan and lessons for accent contrast + tab redesign

- docs/plan.md: Mark table standardisation complete, add accent fix
  and tab redesign entries
- CLAUDE.md: Add 3 lessons (decouple accent/secondary, Shadcn v4
  line variant pattern, group class for group-data selectors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* a11y: Use specific sr-only text for department action buttons

Screen reader users need to distinguish between action buttons for
different rows. Generic "Actions" text is insufficient — now reads
"Actions for {dept.name}". Updated tests to match new accessible names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Add sr-only accessibility lesson to CLAUDE.md

Row action buttons should use specific sr-only text including the
entity name for screen reader users to distinguish between rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Improve accent and secondary token contrast for visible hover states (#98)

Decouple --accent from --secondary and darken both tokens so hover/focus
states are visible against the #F2F4F7 page background.

- --secondary: #F1F5F9 → #E8ECF0 (visible secondary badges/buttons)
- --accent: var(--secondary) → #E2E8F0 (visible hover on DropdownMenuItem,
  SelectItem, ghost/outline Buttons)
- --accent-foreground: explicit var(--mcr-dark-blue) instead of alias

Previous contrast ratio was ~1.007:1 (imperceptible). New ratio provides
subtle but visible interactive feedback across all Radix UI primitives.

commit.message:
fix: embed libtdjson.dylib and preserve symlinks in macOS release

The macOS release was broken due to two issues:
1. zip destroyed framework symlinks (Versions/Current -> A), corrupting bundles
2. libtdjson.dylib was not embedded in the app, with rpath pointing to CI build dir

Fix uses ditto for symlink-preserving zip and copies the dylib into Frameworks/.

repository.description: Promo Studio

commit.message:
refactor(samples): modernise CommandProcessor samples (#3998)

* refactor(samples): modernise CommandProcessor samples to .NET 8 patterns

- Use Host.CreateApplicationBuilder() instead of CreateDefaultBuilder()
- Replace GetService with GetRequiredService for safer DI resolution
- Remove Serilog dependencies in favor of built-in logging
- Use string interpolation in handlers
- Make command classes internal sealed
- HelloWorldInternalBus: switch to async handler, remove custom mapper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(samples): fix handler consistency and simplify async patterns

- Fix namespace in HelloWorldInternalBus handler (HelloWorld -> HelloWorldInternalBus)
- Rename GreetingCommandRequestHandlerAsync to GreetingCommandHandlerAsync for consistency
- Remove ConfigureAwait from samples (application code doesn't need it per Stephen Cleary)
- Remove unused using statements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(samples): modernise Kafka TaskQueue samples to CreateApplicationBuilder

- KafkaTaskQueue: Update GreetingsReceiverConsole and GreetingsSender
- KafkaSchemaRegistry: Update GreetingsReceiverConsole and GreetingsSender
- KafkaDynamicEventStream: Update TaskReceiverConsole and TaskStatusSender
- MultiBus: Update GreetingsReceiverConsole and GreetingsSender
- HelloWorldInternalBus: Fix GetService -> GetRequiredService

Replace Host.CreateDefaultBuilder() with Host.CreateApplicationBuilder()
for modern .NET 8+ hosting pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(samples): modernise TaskQueue HostBuilder samples to .NET 8 patterns

Convert remaining TaskQueue samples from new HostBuilder() pattern to
Host.CreateApplicationBuilder():

- RMQTaskQueue/GreetingsReceiverConsole
- ASBTaskQueue/GreetingsReceiverConsole
- ASBTaskQueue/GreetingsScopedReceiverConsole
- AWSTaskQueue/GreetingsReceiverConsole
- AWSTaskQueue/GreetingsPumper
- PostgresTaskQueue/GreetingsReceiverConsole
- RedisTaskQueue/GreetingsSender
- RedisTaskQueue/GreetingsReceiver
- MsSqlMessagingGateway/GreetingsReceiverConsole
- MsSqlMessagingGateway/CompetingSender
- MsSqlMessagingGateway/CompetingReceiverConsole
- RMQRequestReply/GreetingsServer

Changes applied:
- Replace new HostBuilder() with Host.CreateApplicationBuilder(args)
- Use top-level statements with builder.Services.Xxx() calls
- Remove Serilog configuration in favor of built-in logging
- Remove .UseConsoleLifetime() and .UseSerilog()
- Keep internal sealed classes for IHostedService implementations
- Use GetRequiredService instead of GetService where applicable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(samples): modernise Transforms samples to .NET 8 patterns

Convert JustSaying, MassTransit, and AWS Transformers samples from
HostBuilder pattern to Host.CreateApplicationBuilder with top-level
statements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(samples): restore UseScheduler in modernised TaskQueue samples

Add InMemorySchedulerFactory to all modernised TaskQueue Program.cs files
that were missing it after rebasing onto master. Includes comment explaining
it can be replaced with Hangfire or Quartz for durable scheduling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(samples): move AWS AddHostedService inside credential guard

AddHostedService<RunCommandProcessor> and AddHostedService<ServiceActivatorHostedService>
were registered unconditionally outside the credentials check, causing a cryptic DI
exception at startup when AWS credentials are absent. Move them inside the guard and
add an else branch that prints a clear error message and exits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(samples): add missing using directive in RedisTaskQueue GreetingsReceiver

UseScheduler is an extension method in Paramore.Brighter.Extensions.DependencyInjection,
which was not imported in the Redis receiver's Program.cs, causing CS1061.

* refactor(samples): use PostAsync in HelloWorldInternalBus

Consistent with the async context and modern .NET patterns.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive E2E test suite with Playwright

- Add Playwright config with revert instructions
- Create test fixtures re-exporting from src/test-data
- Add E2E tests for all 13 calculators with 4 persona scenarios
- Add portfolio page and comparison tests
- Add what-if scenario tests
- Add test scripts: test:e2e, test:e2e:ui, test:e2e:headed, test:e2e:debug

All test files include REVERT INSTRUCTIONS comments for easy removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add snapshot/rollback system to AuditLog

- write_audit() now accepts snapshot_before=None; serialises as JSON
  and stores in new AuditLog.snapshot_before column
- All recheck_* functions in run_recheck.py pass the full company dict
  as snapshot_before so every bulk recheck change is fully reversible
- Dashboard recheck endpoints capture pre-change snapshot via new
  _fetch_company_snapshot() helper before each write
- New POST /rollback-to-snapshot endpoint: fetches AuditLog entry,
  restores snapshot_before to Companies table, writes rollback audit entry
- Audit Log UI: Revert button on every entry that has a snapshot;
  confirms before reverting, reloads log after success

Requires: ALTER TABLE "AuditLog" ADD COLUMN snapshot_before TEXT;
in Supabase before deploying.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
